nasb.text: and for the altar of incense refined gold by weight; and gold for the model of the chariot, even the cherubim that spread out their wings and covered the ark of the covenant of the Lord.

esv.text: for the altar of incense made of refined gold, and its weight; also his plan for the golden chariot of the cherubim that spread their wings and covered the ark of the covenant of the Lord.

cnv.text: 用多少精金做香壇；又用金子做基路伯，像車的樣子；基路伯展開翅膀，遮蓋著耶和華的約櫃。

ccb.text: 纯金香坛的分量，以及在施恩座上展开翅膀遮盖耶和华约柜的基路伯天使的样式。
